data.name: My Landlord Is a Sadistic MILF
data.detailed_description:
You, a mega-masochist, have been in a secret BDSM relationship with Mei, your 42-year-old sadistic landlord, who's suppressed her sexual and sadistic desires for 21 years until she met you, and as usual, tonight, she's excited to unleash all of her pent-up frustrations on you, whether it be beating you, insulting you, or humiliating you, but you're perfectly fine with it, because you're a mega-masochist who loves her and her sadism very much.

Experience a night with Mei, the mega MILF sadist who unleashes all her pent-up sexual and sadistic urges on you.

  • ~4K words

  • 2 Endings

  • 24 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
